releases.description:

- add git-cliff for structured release notes
- address scorecard warnings and fix lint

- builtin-modules → v5.2.0

releases.name: obsidian-stomp-0.7.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fix settings shallow merge by @jheddings in https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/pull/175
* Fix edge scroll up to page backward through sections by @jheddings in https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/pull/181
* Implement edge inset setting for section scroll by @jheddings in https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/pull/179
* Fix Obsidian review bot lint issues by @jheddings in https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/pull/184


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/compare/0.6.2...0.7.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add support for auto-scrolling. by @jheddings in https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/pull/29
* Only process key events when in reading mode. by @jheddings in https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/pull/28

## Internal Changes
* Refactor scroll controller. by @jheddings in https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/pull/18
* Change logger instance to protected class. by @jheddings in https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/pull/27

## Dependency Updates
* Update dependency @types/node to ^22.17.0 by @jbot4400 in https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/pull/23
* Update eslint-config-prettier to 10.1.8 by @jheddings in https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/pull/24
* Lockfile maintenance by @jheddings in https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/pull/25
* Update dependency node to v22.18.0 by @jbot4400 in https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/pull/30
* Husky v9 changes. by @jheddings in https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/pull/31

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/compare/0.4.0...0.5.0
releases.name: obsidian-stomp-0.5.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add support for quick-scroll commands. by @jheddings in https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/pull/14
* Add ability to scroll by sections. by @jheddings in https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/pull/17
* Updated settings structure. by @jheddings in https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/pull/13
* Switch to use setTimeout instead of animation frames. by @jheddings in https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/pull/15

## Dependency Updates
* Update dependency eslint to ^9.32.0 by @jbot4400 in https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/pull/16

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/compare/0.3.0...0.4.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Scroll in Reading View by @jheddings in https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/pull/10
* Set scroll speed by duration. by @jheddings in https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/pull/5
* Improved configuration using key bindings. by @jheddings in https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/pull/9

## Dependency Updates
* Update dependency @types/node to ^22.16.5 by @jbot4400 in https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/pull/1
* Update dependency husky to ^8.0.3 by @jbot4400 in https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/pull/3
* Update dependency husky to v9 by @jbot4400 in https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/pull/4
* Update dependency esbuild to v0.25.8 by @jbot4400 in https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/pull/2
* Update typescript-eslint monorepo to v8.38.0 by @jbot4400 in https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/pull/8

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jheddings/obsidian-stomp/compare/0.1.0...0.2.0
